text: Hi, I need a refill for my blood pressure medication. I have three pills left and feel okay.
My incision is more red today and there is some yellow drainage after surgery last week.
I have crushing chest pressure and I am short of breath right now.
It hurts again, should I worry?
Can you send my lab results from last month to my specialist?
My child fell yesterday and now has a swollen ankle and a lot of pain.
